channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: 40 Years After the Meltdown, War Layers Another Disaster on Chernobyl
item.description: Ukraine considers economic uses for the Chernobyl contaminated zone. Ideas have been floated for how the contaminated zone could bring economic benefits to Ukraine. But for the foreseeable future, it will be an army-controlled security belt.

item.title: Israel destroys solar panels in south Lebanon
item.description: Israel destroyed solar panels in south Lebanon. Israel destroys solar panels in south Lebanon.

item.title: Philippines says two US citizens among 19 killed in raid
item.description: Two US citizens, Lyle Prijoles and Kai Dana-Rene Sorem, were killed in a raid in Negros Occidental province. The two Americans, identified as Lyle Prijoles and Kai Dana-Rene Sorem, arrived in Negros Occidental province about a month before they were killed, officials said in a statement late on Saturday (Apr 25).

item.title: What Happened After The New York Times Found a Cartel Mine on a Colombian Military Base
item.description: Colombian military officers denied a large-scale gold operation on their base. Officers denied that an illegal, large-scale gold operation was underway within earshot of their posts. But we had seen it with our own eyes.

item.title: Trump cancels Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan as hopes for peace talks fade
item.description: Trump canceled a trip to Pakistan by Witkoff and Kushner amid fading peace talk hopes. Iran-US war latest: Trump cancels Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan as hopes for peace talks fade The Independent.

item.title: Yemen’s landmine crisis endures despite truce and de-mining efforts
item.description: Landmines in Yemen continue to kill and maim despite ceasefire efforts. De-mining initiatives are ongoing. Landmines in Yemen continue to kill and maim, even amid ceasefire efforts and ongoing de-mining initiatives.

item.title: Swiss International says five injured after flight aborts takeoff in India
item.description: Swiss International flight aborts takeoff in India, five injured. The incident occurred during takeoff. Swiss International says five injured after flight aborts takeoff in India.

item.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill at least five, damage ship in port
item.description: Russian attacks on Ukraine killed at least five people and damaged a ship in port. Ukrainian attacks on Russia injure at least six people in Vologda region and annexed Crimea.

item.title: Journalists' Posts From Trump Event Spark 'Safe Or Unsafe Venue' Debate
item.description: Donald Trump praised the Secret Service for stopping a shooter. The incident sparked a venue safety debate. Donald Trump praised the Secret Service for stopping the shooter. Journalists' Posts From Trump Event Spark 'Safe Or Unsafe Venue' Debate.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Shooting incident won't deter me from win in Iran
item.description: Donald Trump said a shooting incident will not deter him from winning in Iran. He made the statement amid ceasefire talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Shooting incident won't deter me from win in Iran war, says Trump The Times of India.

item.title: Aljamain Sterling calls for featherweight title shot after UFC 116 win
item.description: Aljamain Sterling wants a featherweight title shot against Volkanovski. He won unanimously against Zalal in Las Vegas. Sterling wants a featherweight title shot against Volkanovski after a unanimous win over Zalal in Las Vegas.

item.title: How American taxpayers fund Trump’s wars
item.description: Americans worked 50 days in 2025 to fund war efforts. Contractors received twice the tax money as US troops. Contractors got twice the tax money that US troops did. How American taxpayers fund Trump’s wars.

item.title: World reacts to shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: A shooting occurred at the White House correspondents’ dinner. Politicians and world leaders condemned the attack. US politicians from across the aisle, world leaders condemn the attack and express relief that Trump is safe.

item.title: U.S. lawmakers say violence has no place in the country
item.description: Democrat leader Ro Khanna said political violence is unacceptable in the US after a Secret Service agent was shot. My thoughts are with the brave Secret Service agent who was shot.

item.title: US Bases Suffered Massive Damage In Iran Strikes, Repair May Cost Billions: Report
item.description: Iran strikes damaged US bases, potentially costing billions to repair, including a damaged AWACS aircraft. A damaged US AWACS aircraft following an Iranian strike on a base in Saudi. US Bases Suffered Massive Damage In Iran Strikes, Repair May Cost Billions: Report.

item.title: Trump Evacuated After Gunshots At Event: A Look At Past Threats, Attempts
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots at an event, his second close call after two assassination attempts during the 2024 campaign. This isn't the first time Trump has faced such a situation, as he had met with two assassination attempts during the 2024 campaign.

item.title: Sri Lanka seeks investors for loss-making Mattala airport in Hambantota
item.description: Sri Lanka seeks investors for the loss-making Mattala airport, which India has shown interest in operating through a joint venture. India has in the past expressed interest to operate the airport in Mattala, which has made headlines as the ‘world’s emptiest airport’, including through a joint venture with a Russian company.

item.title: Iran FM Says 'Yet To See If The US Is Truly Serious About Diplomacy'
item.description: Iran's foreign minister said they have yet to see if the US is truly serious about diplomacy. The standoff between the US and Iran has choked off nearly all exports through the strait.

item.title: Japan deploys 1,400 firefighters to battle raging wildfires in the north
item.description: Japan deployed 1,400 firefighters to battle wildfires in the north. The fires have been burning for five days, threatening a town still recovering from the 2011 earthquake and tsunami.

item.title: Trump Event Shooting At Same Hotel Where Ronald Reagan Was Shot 45 Years Ago
item.description: A Trump event was evacuated after gunshots at the same hotel where Ronald Reagan was shot 45 years ago. The entire room was ordered evacuated, and several hundred guests made their way into the Hilton lobby.
